# Indonesian companies on generic TLDs (.com/.net/.co/.io/.app/.xyz/.ai/.dev)
# Tricky for ccTLD-based detection — forces TLS cert / content scan / RDAP.
# Format: one domain per line, # comments ignored by --file.

# E-commerce & marketplace
tokopedia.com
bukalapak.com
blibli.com
bhinneka.com
ralali.com
dekoruma.com
orami.com
ruparupa.com
jakartanotebook.com

airy.com

# Expected: all should classify to ID via ladder layers 4-6
# (ASN brand / TLS cert / content scan / RDAP)
